workloads.name: workgroup-atomic 1024
workloads.description: Windows D3D12 compute contract for the WorkgroupAtomicPerf-aligned atomic kernel.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Strict D3D12 compute contract with adapter-autodiscovered Dawn mapping and direct timing normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.description: Non-atomic workgroup compute kernel with 1024 workgroups, 100 dispatches per step, matching Dawn WorkgroupAtomicPerf non-atomic variant.
workloads.name: workgroup-non-atomic 1024
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Strict D3D12 compute contract with adapter-autodiscovered Dawn mapping and direct timing normalization for the non-atomic workgroup kernel.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.description: Shader robustness pipeline stress aligned with Dawn ShaderRobustnessPerf (MatMulFloatOneDimSharedArray, f32, 512x512x512).
workloads.name: shader-compile pipeline stress
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Strict D3D12 pipeline contract. Both sides create and execute the same compute pipeline shape with adapter-autodiscovered Dawn mapping and direct timing normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.description: Single upload command aligned with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 16MB.
workloads.name: buffer-upload 16MB
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched staged D3D12 upload-copy shape on both sides with adapter-autodiscovered Dawn mapping and strict per-upload timing normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.description: Compute contract aligned to Dawn ConcurrentExecutionTest RunSingle with a single heavy compute dispatch.
workloads.name: concurrent execution single-dispatch contract
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Strict D3D12 compute contract: one heavy compute dispatch per sample with adapter-autodiscovered Dawn mapping and direct timing normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.description: Compute workload aligned to Dawn VulkanZeroInitializeWorkgroupMemoryExtensionTest workgroupSize=256 variant.

workloads.description: Apples-to-apples contract workload for upload-buffer resize churn plus explicit barrier submission.
workloads.name: p0 resource lifecycle contract

workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).
